description: Lente de Compliance: gobernanza, seguridad, privacidad, glosario y notas de auditoria.

checks.description: Governance, security, privacy, compliance, or operational restrictions are not explicit.
checks.why: Restricciones de gobernanza nombradas pero no definidas son riesgo latente (ver IMP-021).

checks.description: Glossary, mandatory constraints, pending inputs, or governance/audit notes are not explicit enough for a complete PRD.
checks.why: El PRD necesita glosario y restricciones obligatorias para ser auditable.
